world_sentence: Butcher-paper cream and ten-AM daylight on the Franklin Street corner, a Bloomfield bottle shop with a sandwich counter, set like a hand-stamped grocery ticket.
acts_diff: Cover(signature pour) -> two color-keyed lanes merged on one page (Shelves bottle-lane, Counter deli-lane) -> Proof -> Visit. The two-lane split (one business, two accent-keyed identities sharing furniture) and the pour-cover differ from the default hero/offerings/process/proof/visit spine in act merging and act medium.
signature_moment: POUR: drag/scroll fills a glass empty->full, settles the meniscus, earns the CTA.
escalation_axis: First build to carry a genuine DUAL retail identity (bottle shop AND deli) as two color-keyed lanes sharing one ticket frame, on a LIGHT daytime ground that diverges from every dark spirits build in the stack.
upsell_note: Active on Google + stale Facebook; no delivery-platform integration (DoorDash/Uber Eats/Instacart open); thin/unclaimed Yelp. Gaps now beyond the site: online ordering/delivery, claimed Yelp, managed social.

divergence.from_brandys_lounge_liquors: Brandy's = dark wine-aubergine night ground, cognac gold, Melodrama serif, passive amber light-field signature. Berkeley = LIGHT butcher-cream daytime ground, navy+red+mustard, Clash Display, active drag-pour signature. Opposite ground, opposite mood, different verb.
divergence.from_obals_inn: Obal's = forest-green pub ground, brass, Libre Caslon italic. Berkeley shares no palette, no type, and is a retail bottle+deli not a pub.
divergence.from_clancys_pub: Clancy's is a pub (parallel build); Berkeley is a bottle shop + deli on a bright retail ticket frame.
